ai_summary: Empower India Limited submitted a revised outcome of its Board Meeting held on June 19, 2026, correcting an initial clerical date error. The board approved the regularization of a new Managing Director and the appointment of new Statutory Auditors, both pending shareholder approval via postal ballot. A significant red flag is the remarkably short 30-minute meeting duration for these material governance decisions, coupled with a confusing e-voting cut-off date (June 12th) that predates the meeting itself, raising concerns about due diligence and procedural accuracy.
